editor.label: Active Mods
editor.description: Specifies the order and which mods are loaded, ModIDs need to be comma seperated and in one line

editor.label: Allow Anyone Baby Imprint Cuddle
editor.description: Use this if you want ANYONE to be able to "take care" of a Baby Dino (cuddle etc.), not just whomever Imprinted on it.

editor.label: Allow Cave Building PvE
editor.description: If set to True, allows building in caves when PvE mode is also enabled.

editor.label: Allow Crate Spawns On Top Of Structures
Allow Flyer Carry PvE
editor.description: Permit flying dinosaurs to pick up other dinosaurs and players when mounted by a player in PvE.

editor.label: Allow Flying Stamina Recovery
editor.description: Set to true if flyers should recover stamina when player is standing on instead riding.

editor.label: Allow Hit Markers
editor.description: Set to false to disable optional hitmarkers for ranged attacks

editor.label: Allow Integrated SPlus Structures
editor.description: If false, disables all of the new S+ structures (intended mainly for letting unofficials that want to keep using the S+ mod version to keep using that without a ton of extra duplicate structures)

editor.label: Allow Multiple Attached C4
editor.description: Set to true to allow to attach more than one C4 per dino.

editor.label: Allow Multiple Tamed Unicorns
editor.description: False = one unicorn on the map at a time, True = one wild and unlimited tamed Unicorns on the map.

editor.label: Allow Third Person Player
editor.description: Enables 3rd Person view.

editor.label: Always Allow Structure Pickup
editor.description: If true, disables the timer on the quick-pickup system.

editor.label: Always Notify Player Joined
editor.description: Players will always get notified if someone joins the server.

editor.label: Always Notify Player Left
editor.description: Players will always get notified if someone leaves the server.

editor.label: Auto Destroy Decayed Dinos
editor.description: Auto-destroy claimable decayed dinos on load, rather than have them remain around as Claimable.

editor.label: Auto PvE Start Time Seconds
editor.description: Seconds after midnight after which PvE is automatically started.

editor.label: Auto PvE Stop Time Seconds
editor.description: Seconds after midnight after which PvE is automatically stopped.

editor.label: Auto Save Period Minutes
editor.description: Set interval for automatic saves

editor.label: Baby Cuddle Grace Period Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how long after delaying cuddling with the Baby before Imprinting Quality starts to decrease.

editor.label: Baby Cuddle Interval Multiplier
editor.description: How often Babies wanna cuddle. More often means you'll need to cuddle with them more frequently to gain Imprinting Quality.

editor.label: Baby Cuddle Lose Imprint Quality Speed Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how fast Imprinting Qualitiy decreases after the grace period if you haven't yet cuddled with the Baby.

editor.label: Baby Food Consumption Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Lower number decreases (by percentage) the speed that baby dinos eat their food.

editor.label: Baby Imprint Amount Multiplier
editor.description:
Multiplier applied to the percentage each imprints provide. For example, if an imprint usually give 10%, setting this multiplier to 0.5 means they would now give 5% each. While setting it to 2.0 means they would now give 20% each, etc.
This multiplier is global, meaning it will affect the imprinting progression of every species.

editor.label: Baby Imprinting Stat Scale Multiplier
editor.description: How much of an effect on stats the Imprinting Quality has. Set it to 0 to effectively disable the system.

editor.label: Baby Mature Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number decreases (by percentage) time needed for baby dino to mature.

editor.label: Allow Custom Recipes
editor.description: Allow custom recipes.

editor.label: Allow Flyer Speed Leveling
editor.description: Specifies whether flyer creatures can have their Movement Speed leveled up.

editor.label: Allow Platform Saddle MultiFloors
editor.description: Set to true to allow multiple platform floors.

editor.label: BanListURL
editor.description: Use the official global ban list, or point to any online ban list that you want.

editor.label: Auto PvE Use System Time
editor.description: Use system time instead of in-game time-.

editor.label: Auto Unlock All Engrams
editor.description: Unlocks all Engrams available. Ignores OverrideEngramEntries and OverrideNamedEngramEntries entries.

editor.label: Disable Default Map Item Sets
editor.description: Disable Genesis 2 Tek Suit on Spawn.

editor.label: Disable Dino Riding
editor.description: Disable riding of dinos.

editor.label: Disable Dino Taming
editor.description: Disable taming of dinos.

editor.label: Disable Friendly Fire
editor.description: Prevent-Friendly-Fire (among tribesmates/tribesdinos/tribesstructures) option for PvP servers.

editor.label: Disable Genesis Missions
editor.description: Enable or disable missions on Genesis.

editor.label: Disable Loot Crates
editor.description: True prevent spawning of Loot crates (artifact creates will still spawn).

editor.label: Disable Structure Placement Collision
editor.description: If 'true' allows for structures to clip into the terrain.

editor.label: Disable World Buffs
editor.description: Disables world effects from Missions (Genesis: Part 2) altogether.

editor.label: Enable World Buff Scaling
editor.description: Makes world effects from Missions (Genesis: Part 2) scale from server settings, rather than add/subtract a flat amount to the value at runtime.

editor.label: Flyer Platform Allow Unaligned Dino Basing
editor.description: Quetz platforms will not allow any non-allied dino to base on them when they are flying. If you want your server to allow non-allied dinos to be able to stand on the Quetz platforms set this to true.

editor.label: Force Can Ride Fliers
editor.description: allows flyers to be used on maps where they normally are disabled NOTE: if you set it to false it will disable flyers on any map.

editor.label: Genesis Use Structures Prevention Volumes
editor.description: Disable building in mission areas on Genesis Part 1 if set to true.

editor.label: Hard Limit Turrets In Range
editor.description:
Enable the retroactive turret hard limit.
This will work on autoturrets, heavy turrets, tek turrets, plant turrets and is no longer map specific. The hard limit calculation is done on start-up, so if your turrets are ever over the limit, they will be randomly shut-off until you're under the limit. In order to restore shut off turrets, you must pick up any which exceed the number, as well as shut-off turrets and replace them in order for them to work.

editor.label: Ignore Structures Prevention Volumes
editor.description: Enable building in Mission Volumes on Genesis Part 1.

editor.label: Passive Defenses Damage Riderless Dinos
editor.description: True allow spike walls to damage wild/riderless Dinos.

editor.label: PvE Allow Tribe War
editor.description: False disables capability for Tribes to officially declare war on each other for mutually-agreed-upon period of time.

editor.label: PvE Allow Tribe War Cancel
editor.description: True allows cancellation of an agreed-upon war before it has actually started.

editor.label: PvE Disable Friendly Fire
editor.description: Prevent-Friendly-Fire (among tribesmates/tribesdinos/tribesstructures) option for PvE servers.

editor.label: Show Creative Mode
editor.description: Enables creative mode.

editor.label: Use Corpse Locator
editor.description: If set to true, you will see a green light beam at the location of your death.

editor.label: Use Tame Limit For Structures Only
editor.description: If true, will make Tame Units only be applied and used for Platforms with Structures and Rafts effectively disabling Tame Units for Dinos without Platform Structures.

editor.label: Clamp Item Spoiling Times
editor.description: Will clamp all spoiling times to the items' maximum spoiling times. Could potentially cause issues with Mods that alter spoiling time.

editor.label: Clamp Resource Harvest Damage
editor.description: Limit the damage caused by a dino to a resource for harvesting.

editor.label: Craft XP Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier to scale the amount of XP earned for crafting.

editor.label: Crop Decay Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number decrease (by percentage) speed of crop decay in plots.

editor.label: Crop Growth Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) speed of crop growth.

editor.label: Cross-ARK AllowF oreign Dino Downloads
editor.description: if set to true, you will be able to tribute download non-native creatures on the Aberration map

editor.label: Custom Recipe Effectiveness Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) the effectiveness of a custom recipe.

editor.label: Custom Recipe Skill Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) the effect of the players crafting speed level that is used as a base for the formula in creating a custom recipe.

editor.label: Day Cycle Speed Scale
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the passage of time in the ARK, controlling how often day changes to night and night changes to day. The default value 1 provides the same cycle speed as the singleplayer experience (and the official public servers). Values lower than 1 slow down the cycle; higher values accelerate it. Base time when value is 1 appears to be 1 minute real time equals approx. 28 minutes game time. Thus, for an approximate 24 hour day/night cycle in game, use .035 for the value.

editor.label: Daytime Speedscale
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the passage of time in the ARK during the day. This value determines the length of each day, relative to the length of each night (as specified by NightTimeSpeedScale. Lowering this value increases the length of each day.

editor.label: Destroy Tames Over Level Clamp﻿
editor.description: Tames that exceed that level will be deleted on server start. Official servers have it set to 449.

editor.label: Destroy Unconnected Water Pipes
editor.description: After two days real-time the pipes will auto-destroy if unconnected to any non-pipe (directly or indirectly) and no allied player is nearby.

editor.label: Difficulty Offset
editor.description: Specifies the difficulty level.

editor.label: Dino Character Food Drain Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for dinosaurs' food consumption. Higher values increase food consumption (dinosaurs get hungry faster). It also affects the taming-times.

editor.label: Dino Character Health Recovery Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for dinosaurs' health recovery. Higher values increase the recovery rate (dinosaurs heal faster).

editor.label: Dino Character Stamina Drain Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for dinosaurs' stamina consumption. Higher values increase stamina consumption (dinosaurs get tired faster).

editor.label: Dino Count Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for dinosaur spawns. Higher values increase the number of dinosaurs spawned throughout the ARK.

editor.label: Dino Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the damage dinosaurs deal with their attacks. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values increase damage. Lower values decrease it.

editor.label: Dino Harvesting Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) the damage done to a harvestable item/entity by a Dino. The higher number, the faster you collect.

editor.label: Dino Resistance Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the resistance to damage dinosaurs receive when attacked. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values decrease resistance, increasing damage per attack. Lower values increase it, reducing damage per attack. A value of 0.5 results in a dino taking half damage while a value of 2.0 would result in a dino taking double normal damage.

editor.label: DinoTurretDamageMultiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) the damage done by Turrets towards a Dino

editor.label: Disable Dino Decay PvE
editor.description: Disable the gradual (7 days) decay of dinosaur ownership. Without this set to true, every dinosaur can be claimed by any player.

editor.label: Disable Imprint Dino Buff
editor.description: Use this to disable the Dino Imprinting-Player Stat Bonus, if you don't like it (where whomever specifically imprinted on the Dino, and Raised it to have an Imprinting Quality, gets extra Damage/Resistance buff).

editor.label: Disable PvE Gamma
editor.description: Prevents use of console command "gamma" in PvE mode.

editor.label: Disable Structure Decay PvE
editor.description: Disable the gradual (7 days) decay of player structures.

editor.label: Egg Hatch Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number decreases (by percentage) time needed for fertilized egg to hatch.

editor.label: Enable Cryo Sickness PVE
editor.description: Enable/Disable Crypod cooldown timer when deploying a creature. If false, deployed creatures do not experience cryosickness.

editor.label: Enable Extra Structure Prevention Volumes
editor.description: Use this to completely disable building in specific resource-rich areas, in particular setup on TheIsland around the major mountains.

editor.label: Enable PvP Gamma
editor.description: Allow use of console command "gamma" in PvP mode.

editor.label: Enable Volcano
editor.description: False = disabled (the volcano will not become active), True = enabled

editor.label: Fast Decay Interval
editor.description: Enable this option for a fixed constant decay period for "Fast Decay" structures (such as pillars or lone foundations). Value is in seconds.

editor.label: Fishing Loot Quality Multiplier
editor.description: Increases the quality of items that have a quality when fishing.

editor.label: Force All Structure Locking
editor.description: Enabling this will default lock all structures

editor.label: Force Flyer Explosives
editor.description: Flyer (except Quetzal and Wyvern can't fly with C4 attached to it. Set this parameter to true to let them still fly.

editor.label: Fuel Consumption Interval Multiplier
editor.description: Define the interval of fuel consumption.

editor.label: Generic XP Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier to scale the amount of XP earned for generic XP (automatic over time).

editor.label: Global Corpse Decomposition Time Multiplier
editor.description: Scales the decomposition time of corpses, (player and dinosaur), globally. Higher values prolong the time.

editor.label: Global Item Decomposition Time Multiplier
editor.description: Scales the decomposition time of dropped items, loot bags etc. globally. Higher values prolong the time.

editor.label: Global Powered Battery Durability Decrease Per Second
Global Spoiling Time Multiplier
editor.description: Scales the spoiling time of perishables globally. Higher values prolong the time.

editor.label: Global Voice Chat
editor.description: Voice chat turns global.

editor.label: Hair Growth Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increase speed of hair growth.

editor.label: Harvest Amount Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for yields from all harvesting activities (chopping down trees, picking berries, carving carcasses, mining rocks, etc.). Higher values increase the amount of materials harvested with each strike.

editor.label: Harvest Health Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the "health" of items that can be harvested (trees, rocks, carcasses, etc.). Higher values increase the amount of damage (i.e. "number of strikes") such objects can withstand before being destroyed, which results in higher overall harvest yields.

editor.label: Harvest XP Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier to scale the amount of XP earned for harvesting.

editor.label: Increase PvP Respawn Interval Base Amount
Increase PvP Respawn Interval Check Period

items.text: No, I want to use a map name
Yes, I want to use a Map Mod ID

editor.label: Start server with MapModID?
editor.description: If selected, the server will startup using the ID you enter in the 'Map' field. Only use this if you want to start using an ID of a Map Mod.

editor.label: Kick Idle Players Period
editor.description: Time after which characters that have not moved or interacted will be kicked (if -EnableIdlePlayerKick as command line parameter is set).

editor.label: Kill XP Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier to scale the amount of XP earned for a kill

editor.label: Lay Egg Interval Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) time between eggs spawning / being laid.

editor.label: Limit Non Player Dropped Items Count
editor.description: Limit the number of droppeditems in an area(together with LimitNonPlayerDroppedItemsRange). Official servers have it set to 600.

editor.label: Limit Non Player Dropped Items Range
editor.description: Limit the number of droppeditems in an area (together with LimitNonPlayerDroppedItemsCount). Official servers have it set to 1600.

gameVariables.name: Map
gameVariables.requiredMessage: You need to set a value for Map

editor.label: Map
editor.description: Specify the map by name (eg. TheCenter). Use the "Map Mod ID" field if you want to specify the map by Mod ID instead.
editor.requiredMessage: You need to set a value for Map

editor.label: Mating Interval Multiplier
editor.description:
Higher number increases (on a percentage scale) interval between which dinosaurs can mate
Example: MatingIntervalMultiplier=0.5 would allow dinosaurs to mate 50% sooner.

editor.label: Mating Speed Multiplier
editor.description:
Higher number increases (by percentage) speed at which dinosaurs mate with each other.
Example: MatingSpeedMultiplier=2.0 would cause dinosaurs to complete mating in half the normal time.

editor.label: Max Alliances Per Tribe
editor.description: Define the maximum alliances a tribe can form or be part of.

editor.label: Max Fall Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Defines the falling speed multiplier at which players starts taking fall damage. The falling speed is based on the time players spent in the air while having a negated Z axis velocity meaning that the higher this setting is, the longer players can fall without taking fall damage. For example, having it set to 0.1 means players will no longer survive a regular jump while having it set very high such as to 100.0 means players will survive a fall from the sky limit, etc. This setting doesn't affect the gravity scale of the players so there won't be any physics difference to the character movements.

editor.label: Max Gate Frame On Saddles
editor.description:
Defines the maximum amount of gateways allowed on platform saddles.
Example: MaxGateFrameOnSaddles=2
Would prevent players from placing more than 2 gateways on their platform saddles. This setting is not retroactive, meaning existing builds won't be affected. Set to 0 to not impose any limits.
Official PVP servers have it set to 2.

editor.label: Max Number Of Players In Tribe
editor.description: Set this to a number > 0 to act as a limit. 1 Player Tribes effectively disables Tribes.

editor.label: Max Personal Tamed Dinos
editor.description: Activates a per-tribe dino tame limit. (500 on official servers).

editor.label: Max Platform Saddle Structure Limit
editor.description:
Changes the maximum number of platformed-creatures/rafts allowed on the ARK (a potential performance cost)
Example: MaxPlatformSaddleStructureLimit=10 would only allow 10 platform saddles / rafts across the entire ark.

editor.label: Max Tamed Dinos
editor.description: Sets the maximum number of tamed Dinos on a Server, this is a global cap.

editor.label: Max Tribe Logs
editor.description: How many Tribe logs are displayed for each tribe.

editor.label: Max Tribes Per Alliance
editor.description: Define the maximum of tribes in an alliance.

editor.label: Message Of The Day Duration
editor.description: Number of seconds to show the Message Of The Day.

gameVariables.name: MessageOfTheDayMessage
gameVariables.defaultValue: This server is hosted by TCAdmin.com

editor.defaultValue: This server is hosted by TCAdmin.com
editor.label: Message Of The Day
editor.description: Show a MOTD to players after joining the server.

editor.label: Minimum Dino Reupload Interval
editor.description: Number of seconds cooldown between allowed Dino re-uploads (defaults to 0, set to 43200 on Official Servers which is 12 hours).

editor.label: Nighttime Speedscale
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the passage of time in the ARK during night time. This value determines the length of each night, relative to the length of each day (as specified by DayTimeSpeedScale. Lowering this value increases the length of each night.

editor.label: No Tribute Downloads
editor.description: Disables downloading characters from other servers.

editor.label: NPC Network Stasis Range Scale Percent End
NPC Network Stasis Range Scale Player Count End
NPC Network Stasis Range Scale Player Count Start
Only Auto Destroy Core Structures
editor.description: You can launch an autodestroy enabled server with this opion to prevent any non-core/non-foundation structures from autodestroying (however they'll still get autodestroyed if a floor that they're on gets autodestroyed, of course). Official PvE Servers use this option.

editor.label: Override Max Experience Points Player
editor.description: Overrides the Max XP cap of players & dinosaur characters, respectively, by exact specified amount.

editor.label: Override Official Difficulty
editor.description: Allows you to override the default server difficulty level of 4 with 5 to match the new official server difficulty level.

editor.label: Override Structure Platform Prevention
editor.description: Use this override if you want turret or spike structures to be buildable and functional on platform saddles.

editor.label: Oxygen Swim Speed Stat Multiplier
editor.description: Use this to set how swim speed is multiplied by level spent in oxygen.

editor.label: Passive Tame Interval Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how often you get tame requests for passive tame dinos.

editor.label: Per Platform Max Structures Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (on a percentage scale) max number of items place-able on saddles and rafts.

editor.label: Personal Tamed Dinos Saddle Structure Cost
editor.description: Determines the amount of dinoslots a platform saddle will use towards the tribe dino limit

editor.label: Platform Saddle Build Area Bounds Multiplier
editor.description: increasing the number allows structures being placed further away from the platform.

editor.label: Player Character Food Drain Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for player characters' food consumption. Higher values increase food consumption (player characters get hungry faster).

editor.label: Player Character Health Recovery Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for player characters' health recovery. Higher values increase the recovery rate (player characters heal faster).

editor.label: Player Character Stamina Drain Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for player characters' stamina consumption. Higher values increase stamina consumption (player characters get tired faster).

editor.label: Player Character Water Drain Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for player characters' water consumption. Higher values increase water consumption (player characters get thirsty faster).

editor.label: Player Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the damage players deal with their attacks. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values increase damage. Lower values decrease it.

editor.label: Player Harvesting Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) the damage done to a harvestable item/entity by a Player. The higher number, the faster you collect.

editor.label: Player Resistance Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the resistance to damage players receive when attacked. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values decrease resistance, increasing damage per attack. Lower values increase it, reducing damage per attack. A value of 0.5 results in a player taking half damage while a value of 2.0 would result in taking double normal damage.

editor.label: Poop Interval Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number decreases (by percentage) how frequently you can poop.

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: This will completely disable Diseases on the server. (thus far just 'Swamp Fever').

editor.label: Prevent Download Dinos
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer.

editor.label: Prevent Download Items
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer.

editor.label: Prevent Download Survivors
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer

editor.label: Prevent Mate Boost
editor.description: Set to false to disable Dino Mate Boost

editor.label: Prevent Offline PvP
editor.description: Use this to enable the offline raiding prevention option.

editor.label: Prevent Offline PvP Connection Invincible Interval
Prevent Offline PvP Interval (seconds)
editor.description: A value of 900 would be a 15 min wait before a tribe/players dinos/structures become invulnerable/inactive after they log off. (if Tribe, requires ALL Tribe members logged off!)

editor.label: Prevent Upload Dinos
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer.

editor.label: Prevent Upload Items
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer.

editor.label: Prevent Upload Survivors
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer.

editor.label: Proximity Chat
editor.description: Only players near each other can see their chat messages

editor.label: PvE Dino Decay Period Multiplier
editor.description: Controls how soon other players will be able to claim dinos. A value of 1 is 7 days.

editor.label: PvE Structure Decay Destruction Period
editor.description: Specifies the time required for player structures to decay in PvE mode. The specific effect(s) of this option and its range of valid values are unknown as of this writing.

editor.label: PvE Structure Decay Period Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the decay rate of player structures in PvE mode. The specific effect(s) of this option and its range of valid values are unknown as of this writing.

editor.label: PvP Dino Decay
editor.description: Set to true to prevent dinosaurs from decaying while the Offline Raiding Prevention is active.

editor.label: PvP Structure Decay
editor.description: Set to true to prevent structure from decaying while the Offline Raiding Prevention is active.

editor.label: PvP Zone Structure Damage Multiplier
editor.description:
Specifies the scaling factor for damage structures take within caves.
The lower the value, the less damage the structure takes (i.e. setting to 1.0 will make structure built in or near a cave receive the same amount of damage as those built on the surface).

editor.label: Random Supply Crate Points
editor.description: If true, supply drops are in random locations. NOTE: This setting is known to cause artifacts becoming inaccesable on Ragnarok if active.

editor.label: RCON Server Game Log Buffer
editor.description: Determines how many lines of gamelogs are send over RCON.

editor.label: Resource No Replenish Radius Players
editor.description: Allow resources to regrow closer or farther away from players. Values higher than 1 increase the distance around players where resources are not allowed to grow back. Values between 0 and 1 will reduce it.

editor.label: ResourceNoReplenishRadiusStructures
editor.description: Allow resources to regrow closer or farther away from structures. Values higher than 1 increase the distance around structures where resources are not allowed to grow back. Values between 0 and 1 will reduce it.

editor.label: Resources Respawn Period Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the respawn rate for resource nodes (trees, rocks, bushes, etc.). Lower values cause nodes to respawn more frequently.

editor.label: Server Auto Force Respawn Wild Dinos Interval
editor.description:
Force Respawn of Wild Dinos on Server Restart. Enabled by default on official servers, this will force weekly respawns of dinos on all servers to prevent certain dino types (like the Basilo and Spino) from becoming depopulated on long running servers.
NOTE in some cases this may not work more than once.

editor.label: Server Crosshair
editor.description: Use this to disable the Crosshair on your Server.

editor.label: Server Force No Hud
editor.description: HUD always disabled.

editor.label: Server Hardcore
editor.description: Enables hardcore mode (player characters revert to level 1 upon death).

editor.label: PvP or PvE
editor.description: Setting to PvP enables Player vs. Player. Setting to PvE enables Player vs. Environment.

editor.label: Show Floating Damage Text
editor.description: Use this to enable RPG-style popup text stat mode.

editor.label: Show Map Player Location
editor.description: Show each player their own precise position when they view their map.

editor.label: Special XP Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier to scale the amount of XP earned for SpecialEvents.

editor.label: Spectator Password
editor.description: To use non-admin spectator, the server must specify a spectator password. Then any client can use these console commands: requestspectator <password> and stopspectating.

editor.label: Structure Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the damage structures deal with their attacks (i.e. spiked walls). The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values increase damage. Lower values decrease it.

editor.label: Structure Pickup Hold Duration
editor.description:
Used to specify the quick-pickup hold duration
Use 0 to disable and have instant pickup

editor.label: Structure Pickup Time After Placement
editor.description: Amount of time in seconds after placement that quick pickup is available.

editor.label: Structure Resistance Multiplier
editor.description:
Specifies the scaling factor for the resistance to damage structures receive when attacked. 
The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values decrease resistance, increasing damage per attack. 
Lower values increase it, reducing damage per attack. 
A value of 0.5 results in a structure taking half damage while a value of 2.0 would result in a structure taking double normal damage.

editor.label: Supply Crate Loot Quality Multiplier
editor.description: Increases the quality of items that have a quality in the supply crates. The quality also depends on the Difficulty Offset.

editor.label: Tamed Dino Character Food Drain Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how fast tame dinos consume food.

editor.label: Tamed Dino Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the damage tamed dinosaurs deal with their attacks. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values increase damage. Lower values decrease it.

editor.label: Tamed Dino Resistance Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the resistance to damage tamed dinosaurs receive when attacked. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values decrease resistance, increasing damage per attack. Lower values increase it, reducing damage per attack. A value of 0.5 results in a tamed dino taking half damage while a value of 2.0 would result in a tamed dino taking double normal damage.

editor.label: Tamed Dino Torpor Drain Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how fast tamed dinos lose torpor.

editor.label: Taming Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for dinosaur taming speed. Higher values make taming faster.

editor.label: The Max Structures In Range
editor.description: Specifies the maximum number of structures that can be constructed within a certain (currently hard-coded) range.

editor.label: Total Conversion Mod
editor.description: Use this setting to enable Total Conversion Mods on your server.

editor.label: Tribe Slot Reuse Cooldown
editor.description: Set this to a number > 0 to act as a timer. Locks a tribe slot for the value in seconds, so a value of 3600 would mean that if someone leaves the tribe, their place cannot be taken by another player (or rejoin) for 1 hour. Used on Official Small Tribes Servers.

editor.label: Unicorn Spawn Interval
editor.description: How long the game should wait before spawning a new Unicorn if the wild one is killed (or tamed, if AllowMultipleTamedUnicorns is enabled). This value sets the minimum amount of time (in hours), and the maximum is equal to 2x this value.

editor.label: Use Corpse Life Span Multiplier
editor.description: Modifies corpse AND dropped box lifespan.

editor.label: Use Fjordur Traversal Buff
editor.description: Enable and disable the biome teleport in Fjordur when holding <kbd>R</kbd>

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: Enable additional dupe protection.

editor.label: Use Optimized Harvesting Health
editor.description:
"Optimized" server with high HarvestAmountMultiplier (but less rare items). 
If you want to have a high HarvestAmountMultiplier, you might experience lag if this setting is not enabled.

editor.label: Volcano Intensity
editor.description: The lower the value, the more intense the volcano's eruption will be. Recommended to leave at 1. The minimum value is 0.25, and for multiplayer games, it should not go below 0.5. Very high numbers will basically disable the flaming rocks flung out of the volcano.

editor.label: Volcano Interval
editor.description: 0 = 5000 (min) - 15000 (max) seconds between instances of the volcano becoming active. Any number above 0 acts as a multiplier, with a minimum value of .1

editor.label: Wild Dino Character Food Drain Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how fast wild dinos consume food.

editor.label: Wild Dino Torpor Drain Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how fast wild dinos lose torpor.

editor.label: World Buff Scaling Efficacy
editor.description: Makes world effects from Missions (Genesis: Part 2) scaling more or less effective when setting bEnableWorldBuffScaling=true. 1 would be default, 0.5 would be 50% less effective, 100 would be 100x more effective.

editor.label: XP Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the experience received by players, tribes and dinosaurs for various actions. The default value 1 provides the same amounts of experience as in the singleplayer experience (and official public servers). Higher values increase XP amounts awarded for various actions; lower values decrease it.

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: Prevents wild dinos from being spawned.

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: disable non-meat Fish Loot when using Fishing Rod.

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: Force Flyer dinos to be allowed into caves (Flyers able to go into caves by default on custom maps).

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: Launch with this command to destroy all wild creatures on a startup. (this will only destroy wild creatures that are NOT currently being tamed).

editor.label: Active Event
editor.description:
Enables a specified event.
Only one can be specified and active at a time.

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: Will turn off the anti meshing system entirely.

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: Will turn off the anti meshing player kills (but still allow teleporting).

editor.label: CrossPlay
editor.description: enables Crossplay (between EPIC and Steam) on Dedicated Server.

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: Cause characters that have not moved or interacted within the KickIdlePlayersPeriod to be kicked.

editor.label: Disable
editor.description: Disable Valve Anti-Cheat (VAC) system.

editor.label: Disable
editor.description: Run server without BattleEye.

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: Anti speedhack detection is now enabled by default — to disable it, use this server commandline.

editor.label: Enable
editor.description: Activate Web alarms when important things happen to a tribe, such as Tripwire Alarms going off and Babies being born. See Web Notifications

editor.label: Extinction Event Time Interval
editor.description: Set to 2592000 to enable extinction 30 days. The number is the time in seconds.

editor.label: Enable
editor.description:
Enables the use of the dynamic config, if you dont provide a customdynamicconfigurl the server will use the default dynamic config for that platform (the one used on official server)
NOTE: Unless you force an immediate update using the ForceUpdateDynamicConfig command, it takes about 15 minutes for the config to take effect after the file has been changed. When you want to "undo" the config you should be changing it back to whatever your default is.

editor.label: Custom Dynamic Config URL
editor.description:
Direct link to config file e.g.: http://arkdedicated.com/dynamicconfig.ini ;
currently only the following options are supported to be adjusted dynamically: TamingSpeedMultiplier, HarvestAmountMultiplier, XPMultiplier, MatingIntervalMultiplier, BabyMatureSpeedMultiplier, EggHatchSpeedMultiplier, BabyFoodConsumptionSpeedMultiplier, CropGrowthSpeedMultiplier, MatingSpeedMultiplier, BabyCuddleIntervalMultiplier, BabyImprintAmountMultiplier, CustomRecipeEffectivenessMultiplier, TributeItemExpirationSeconds, TributeDinoExpirationSeconds, EnableFullDump, GUseServerNetSpeedCheck, bUseAlarmNotifications, HexagonRewardMultiplier and NPCReplacements.

editor.label: Difficulty Offset
editor.description: Specifies the difficulty level.

editor.label: Override Official Difficulty
editor.description: Allows you to override the default server difficulty level of 4 with 5 to match the new official server difficulty level.

editor.label: Server Hardcore
editor.description: Enables hardcore mode (player characters revert to level 1 upon death).

editor.label: PvP or PvE
editor.description: Setting to PvP enables Player vs. Player. Setting to PvE enables Player vs. Environment.

editor.label: Server Crosshair
editor.description: Use this to disable the Crosshair on your Server.

editor.label: Allow Hit Markers
editor.description: Set to false to disable optional hitmarkers for ranged attacks

editor.label: Server Force No Hud
editor.description: HUD always disabled.

editor.label: Show Floating Damage Text
editor.description: Use this to enable RPG-style popup text stat mode.

editor.label: RCON Server Game Log Buffer
editor.description: Determines how many lines of gamelogs are send over RCON.

editor.label: Spectator Password
editor.description: To use non-admin spectator, the server must specify a spectator password. Then any client can use these console commands: requestspectator <password> and stopspectating.

editor.label: Active Mods
editor.description: Specifies the order and which mods are loaded, ModIDs need to be comma seperated and in one line

editor.defaultValue: This server is hosted by TCAdmin.com
editor.label: Message Of The Day
editor.description: Show a MOTD to players after joining the server.

editor.label: Message Of The Day Duration
editor.description: Number of seconds to show the Message Of The Day.

editor.label: BanListURL
editor.description: Use the official global ban list, or point to any online ban list that you want.

editor.label: Auto Save Period Minutes
editor.description: Set interval for automatic saves

editor.label: Disable PvE Gamma
editor.description: Prevents use of console command "gamma" in PvE mode.

editor.label: Allow Cave Building PvE
editor.description: If set to True, allows building in caves when PvE mode is also enabled.

editor.label: Allow Flyer Carry PvE
editor.description: Permit flying dinosaurs to pick up other dinosaurs and players when mounted by a player in PvE.

editor.label: Disable Structure Decay PvE
editor.description: Disable the gradual (7 days) decay of player structures.

editor.label: Disable Dino Decay PvE
editor.description: Disable the gradual (7 days) decay of dinosaur ownership. Without this set to true, every dinosaur can be claimed by any player.

editor.label: PvE Dino Decay Period Multiplier
editor.description: Controls how soon other players will be able to claim dinos. A value of 1 is 7 days.

editor.label: PvE Structure Decay Destruction Period
editor.description: Specifies the time required for player structures to decay in PvE mode. The specific effect(s) of this option and its range of valid values are unknown as of this writing.

editor.label: PvE Structure Decay Period Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the decay rate of player structures in PvE mode. The specific effect(s) of this option and its range of valid values are unknown as of this writing.

editor.label: Enable Cryo Sickness PVE
editor.description: Enable/Disable Crypod cooldown timer when deploying a creature. If false, deployed creatures do not experience cryosickness.

editor.label: Enable PvP Gamma
editor.description: Allow use of console command "gamma" in PvP mode.

editor.label: Prevent Offline PvP
editor.description: Use this to enable the offline raiding prevention option.

editor.label: PvP Structure Decay
editor.description: Set to true to prevent structure from decaying while the Offline Raiding Prevention is active.

editor.label: PvP Dino Decay
editor.description: Set to true to prevent dinosaurs from decaying while the Offline Raiding Prevention is active.

editor.label: Prevent Offline PvP Interval (seconds)
editor.description: A value of 900 would be a 15 min wait before a tribe/players dinos/structures become invulnerable/inactive after they log off. (if Tribe, requires ALL Tribe members logged off!)

editor.label: Allow Third Person Player
editor.description: Enables 3rd Person view.

editor.label: Always Notify Player Joined
editor.description: Players will always get notified if someone joins the server.

editor.label: Always Notify Player Left
editor.description: Players will always get notified if someone leaves the server.

editor.label: Show Map Player Location
editor.description: Show each player their own precise position when they view their map.

editor.label: Kick Idle Players Period
editor.description: Time after which characters that have not moved or interacted will be kicked (if -EnableIdlePlayerKick as command line parameter is set).

editor.label: XP Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the experience received by players, tribes and dinosaurs for various actions. The default value 1 provides the same amounts of experience as in the singleplayer experience (and official public servers). Higher values increase XP amounts awarded for various actions; lower values decrease it.

editor.label: Player Character Food Drain Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for player characters' food consumption. Higher values increase food consumption (player characters get hungry faster).

editor.label: Player Character Health Recovery Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for player characters' health recovery. Higher values increase the recovery rate (player characters heal faster).

editor.label: Player Character Stamina Drain Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for player characters' stamina consumption. Higher values increase stamina consumption (player characters get tired faster).

editor.label: Player Character Water Drain Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for player characters' water consumption. Higher values increase water consumption (player characters get thirsty faster).

editor.label: Player Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the damage players deal with their attacks. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values increase damage. Lower values decrease it.

editor.label: Player Resistance Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the resistance to damage players receive when attacked. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values decrease resistance, increasing damage per attack. Lower values increase it, reducing damage per attack. A value of 0.5 results in a player taking half damage while a value of 2.0 would result in taking double normal damage.

editor.label: Oxygen Swim Speed Stat Multiplier
editor.description: Use this to set how swim speed is multiplied by level spent in oxygen.

editor.label: Force Can Ride Fliers
editor.description: allows flyers to be used on maps where they normally are disabled NOTE: if you set it to false it will disable flyers on any map.

editor.label: Force Flyer Explosives
editor.description: Flyer (except Quetzal and Wyvern can't fly with C4 attached to it. Set this parameter to true to let them still fly.

editor.label: Allow Flying Stamina Recovery
editor.description: Set to true if flyers should recover stamina when player is standing on instead riding.

editor.label: Allow Multiple Attached C4
editor.description: Set to true to allow to attach more than one C4 per dino.

editor.label: Disable Imprint Dino Buff
editor.description: Use this to disable the Dino Imprinting-Player Stat Bonus, if you don't like it (where whomever specifically imprinted on the Dino, and Raised it to have an Imprinting Quality, gets extra Damage/Resistance buff).

editor.label: Allow Anyone Baby Imprint Cuddle
editor.description: Use this if you want ANYONE to be able to "take care" of a Baby Dino (cuddle etc.), not just whomever Imprinted on it.

editor.label: Prevent Mate Boost
editor.description: Set to false to disable Dino Mate Boost

editor.label: Max Tamed Dinos
editor.description: Sets the maximum number of tamed Dinos on a Server, this is a global cap.

editor.label: Max Personal Tamed Dinos
editor.description: Activates a per-tribe dino tame limit. (500 on official servers).

editor.label: Auto Destroy Decayed Dinos
editor.description: Auto-destroy claimable decayed dinos on load, rather than have them remain around as Claimable.

editor.label: Server Auto Force Respawn Wild Dinos Interval
editor.description:
Force Respawn of Wild Dinos on Server Restart. Enabled by default on official servers, this will force weekly respawns of dinos on all servers to prevent certain dino types (like the Basilo and Spino) from becoming depopulated on long running servers.
NOTE in some cases this may not work more than once.

editor.label: Minimum Dino Reupload Interval
editor.description: Number of seconds cooldown between allowed Dino re-uploads (defaults to 0, set to 43200 on Official Servers which is 12 hours).

editor.label: Dino Count Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for dinosaur spawns. Higher values increase the number of dinosaurs spawned throughout the ARK.

editor.label: Taming Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for dinosaur taming speed. Higher values make taming faster.

editor.label: Dino Character Food Drain Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for dinosaurs' food consumption. Higher values increase food consumption (dinosaurs get hungry faster). It also affects the taming-times.

editor.label: Dino Character Health Recovery Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for dinosaurs' health recovery. Higher values increase the recovery rate (dinosaurs heal faster).

editor.label: Dino Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the damage dinosaurs deal with their attacks. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values increase damage. Lower values decrease it.

editor.label: Dino Resistance Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the resistance to damage dinosaurs receive when attacked. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values decrease resistance, increasing damage per attack. Lower values increase it, reducing damage per attack. A value of 0.5 results in a dino taking half damage while a value of 2.0 would result in a dino taking double normal damage.

editor.label: Dino Character Stamina Drain Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for dinosaurs' stamina consumption. Higher values increase stamina consumption (dinosaurs get tired faster).

editor.label: Tamed Dino Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the damage tamed dinosaurs deal with their attacks. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values increase damage. Lower values decrease it.

editor.label: Tamed Dino Resistance Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the resistance to damage tamed dinosaurs receive when attacked. The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values decrease resistance, increasing damage per attack. Lower values increase it, reducing damage per attack. A value of 0.5 results in a tamed dino taking half damage while a value of 2.0 would result in a tamed dino taking double normal damage.

editor.label: Personal Tamed Dinos Saddle Structure Cost
editor.description: Determines the amount of dinoslots a platform saddle will use towards the tribe dino limit

editor.label: Only Auto Destroy Core Structures
editor.description: You can launch an autodestroy enabled server with this opion to prevent any non-core/non-foundation structures from autodestroying (however they'll still get autodestroyed if a floor that they're on gets autodestroyed, of course). Official PvE Servers use this option.

editor.label: Force All Structure Locking
editor.description: Enabling this will default lock all structures

editor.label: The Max Structures In Range
editor.description: Specifies the maximum number of structures that can be constructed within a certain (currently hard-coded) range.

editor.label: Structure Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the damage structures deal with their attacks (i.e. spiked walls). The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values increase damage. Lower values decrease it.

editor.label: Structure Resistance Multiplier
editor.description:
Specifies the scaling factor for the resistance to damage structures receive when attacked. 
The default value 1 provides normal damage. Higher values decrease resistance, increasing damage per attack. 
Lower values increase it, reducing damage per attack. 
A value of 0.5 results in a structure taking half damage while a value of 2.0 would result in a structure taking double normal damage.

editor.label: Allow Platform Saddle MultiFloors
editor.description: Set to true to allow multiple platform floors.

editor.label: Platform Saddle Build Area Bounds Multiplier
editor.description: increasing the number allows structures being placed further away from the platform.

editor.label: Per Platform Max Structures Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (on a percentage scale) max number of items place-able on saddles and rafts.

editor.label: Max Platform Saddle Structure Limit
editor.description:
Changes the maximum number of platformed-creatures/rafts allowed on the ARK (a potential performance cost)
Example: MaxPlatformSaddleStructureLimit=10 would only allow 10 platform saddles / rafts across the entire ark.

editor.label: Max Gate Frame On Saddles
editor.description:
Defines the maximum amount of gateways allowed on platform saddles.
Example: MaxGateFrameOnSaddles=2
Would prevent players from placing more than 2 gateways on their platform saddles. This setting is not retroactive, meaning existing builds won't be affected. Set to 0 to not impose any limits.
Official PVP servers have it set to 2.

editor.label: Allow Crate Spawns On Top Of Structures
Override Structure Platform Prevention
editor.description: Use this override if you want turret or spike structures to be buildable and functional on platform saddles.

editor.label: Enable Extra Structure Prevention Volumes
editor.description: Use this to completely disable building in specific resource-rich areas, in particular setup on TheIsland around the major mountains.

editor.label: Destroy Unconnected Water Pipes
editor.description: After two days real-time the pipes will auto-destroy if unconnected to any non-pipe (directly or indirectly) and no allied player is nearby.

editor.label: Day Cycle Speed Scale
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the passage of time in the ARK, controlling how often day changes to night and night changes to day. The default value 1 provides the same cycle speed as the singleplayer experience (and the official public servers). Values lower than 1 slow down the cycle; higher values accelerate it. Base time when value is 1 appears to be 1 minute real time equals approx. 28 minutes game time. Thus, for an approximate 24 hour day/night cycle in game, use .035 for the value.

editor.label: Daytime Speedscale
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the passage of time in the ARK during the day. This value determines the length of each day, relative to the length of each night (as specified by NightTimeSpeedScale. Lowering this value increases the length of each day.

editor.label: Nighttime Speedscale
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the passage of time in the ARK during night time. This value determines the length of each night, relative to the length of each day (as specified by DayTimeSpeedScale. Lowering this value increases the length of each night.

editor.label: Use Optimized Harvesting Health
editor.description:
"Optimized" server with high HarvestAmountMultiplier (but less rare items). 
If you want to have a high HarvestAmountMultiplier, you might experience lag if this setting is not enabled.

editor.label: Harvest Amount Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for yields from all harvesting activities (chopping down trees, picking berries, carving carcasses, mining rocks, etc.). Higher values increase the amount of materials harvested with each strike.

editor.label: Harvest Health Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the "health" of items that can be harvested (trees, rocks, carcasses, etc.). Higher values increase the amount of damage (i.e. "number of strikes") such objects can withstand before being destroyed, which results in higher overall harvest yields.

editor.label: Resources Respawn Period Multiplier
editor.description: Specifies the scaling factor for the respawn rate for resource nodes (trees, rocks, bushes, etc.). Lower values cause nodes to respawn more frequently.

editor.label: Clamp Resource Harvest Damage
editor.description: Limit the damage caused by a dino to a resource for harvesting.

editor.label: Random Supply Crate Points
editor.description: If true, supply drops are in random locations. NOTE: This setting is known to cause artifacts becoming inaccesable on Ragnarok if active.

editor.label: Clamp Item Spoiling Times
editor.description: Will clamp all spoiling times to the items' maximum spoiling times. Could potentially cause issues with Mods that alter spoiling time.

editor.label: No Tribute Downloads
editor.description: Disables downloading characters from other servers.

editor.label: Prevent Download Survivors
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer

editor.label: Prevent Download Items
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer.

editor.label: Prevent Download Dinos
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer.

editor.label: Prevent Upload Survivors
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer.

editor.label: Prevent Upload Items
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer.

editor.label: Prevent Upload Dinos
editor.description: Prevent Cross-ARK Data Transfer.

editor.label: NPC Network Stasis Range Scale Player Count Start
NPC Network Stasis Range Scale Player Count End
NPC Network Stasis Range Scale Percent End
Global Voice Chat
editor.description: Voice chat turns global.

editor.label: Proximity Chat
editor.description: Only players near each other can see their chat messages

editor.label: Cross-ARK AllowF oreign Dino Downloads
editor.description: if set to true, you will be able to tribute download non-native creatures on the Aberration map

editor.label: Allow Multiple Tamed Unicorns
editor.description: False = one unicorn on the map at a time, True = one wild and unlimited tamed Unicorns on the map.

editor.label: Unicorn Spawn Interval
editor.description: How long the game should wait before spawning a new Unicorn if the wild one is killed (or tamed, if AllowMultipleTamedUnicorns is enabled). This value sets the minimum amount of time (in hours), and the maximum is equal to 2x this value.

editor.label: Enable Volcano
editor.description: False = disabled (the volcano will not become active), True = enabled

editor.label: Volcano Intensity
editor.description: The lower the value, the more intense the volcano's eruption will be. Recommended to leave at 1. The minimum value is 0.25, and for multiplayer games, it should not go below 0.5. Very high numbers will basically disable the flaming rocks flung out of the volcano.

editor.label: Volcano Interval
editor.description: 0 = 5000 (min) - 15000 (max) seconds between instances of the volcano becoming active. Any number above 0 acts as a multiplier, with a minimum value of .1

editor.label: Always Allow Structure Pickup
editor.description: If true, disables the timer on the quick-pickup system.

editor.label: Structure Pickup Time After Placement
editor.description: Amount of time in seconds after placement that quick pickup is available.

editor.label: Allow Integrated SPlus Structures
editor.description: If false, disables all of the new S+ structures (intended mainly for letting unofficials that want to keep using the S+ mod version to keep using that without a ton of extra duplicate structures)

editor.label: Structure Pickup Hold Duration
editor.description:
Used to specify the quick-pickup hold duration
Use 0 to disable and have instant pickup

editor.label: Use Fjordur Traversal Buff
editor.description: Enable and disable the biome teleport in Fjordur when holding <kbd>R</kbd>

editor.label: Map
editor.description: Specify the map by name (eg. TheCenter). Use the "Map Mod ID" field if you want to specify the map by Mod ID instead.
editor.requiredMessage: You need to set a value for Map

items.text: No, I want to use a map name
Yes, I want to use a Map Mod ID

editor.label: Start server with MapModID?
editor.description: If selected, the server will startup using the ID you enter in the 'Map' field. Only use this if you want to start using an ID of a Map Mod.

editor.label: Kill XP Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier to scale the amount of XP earned for a kill

editor.label: Harvest XP Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier to scale the amount of XP earned for harvesting.

editor.label: Craft XP Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier to scale the amount of XP earned for crafting.

editor.label: Generic XP Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier to scale the amount of XP earned for generic XP (automatic over time).

editor.label: Special XP Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier to scale the amount of XP earned for SpecialEvents.

editor.label: Override Max Experience Points Player
editor.description: Overrides the Max XP cap of players & dinosaur characters, respectively, by exact specified amount.

editor.label: Mating Interval Multiplier
editor.description:
Higher number increases (on a percentage scale) interval between which dinosaurs can mate
Example: MatingIntervalMultiplier=0.5 would allow dinosaurs to mate 50% sooner.

editor.label: Mating Speed Multiplier
editor.description:
Higher number increases (by percentage) speed at which dinosaurs mate with each other.
Example: MatingSpeedMultiplier=2.0 would cause dinosaurs to complete mating in half the normal time.

editor.label: Lay Egg Interval Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) time between eggs spawning / being laid.

editor.label: Egg Hatch Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number decreases (by percentage) time needed for fertilized egg to hatch.

editor.label: Baby Mature Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number decreases (by percentage) time needed for baby dino to mature.

editor.label: Baby Food Consumption Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Lower number decreases (by percentage) the speed that baby dinos eat their food.

editor.label: Baby Imprinting Stat Scale Multiplier
editor.description: How much of an effect on stats the Imprinting Quality has. Set it to 0 to effectively disable the system.

editor.label: Baby Imprint Amount Multiplier
editor.description:
Multiplier applied to the percentage each imprints provide. For example, if an imprint usually give 10%, setting this multiplier to 0.5 means they would now give 5% each. While setting it to 2.0 means they would now give 20% each, etc.
This multiplier is global, meaning it will affect the imprinting progression of every species.

editor.label: Baby Cuddle Interval Multiplier
editor.description: How often Babies wanna cuddle. More often means you'll need to cuddle with them more frequently to gain Imprinting Quality.

editor.label: Baby Cuddle Grace Period Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how long after delaying cuddling with the Baby before Imprinting Quality starts to decrease.

editor.label: Baby Cuddle Lose Imprint Quality Speed Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how fast Imprinting Qualitiy decreases after the grace period if you haven't yet cuddled with the Baby.

editor.label: Crop Growth Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) speed of crop growth.

editor.label: Global Spoiling Time Multiplier
editor.description: Scales the spoiling time of perishables globally. Higher values prolong the time.

editor.label: Global Item Decomposition Time Multiplier
editor.description: Scales the decomposition time of dropped items, loot bags etc. globally. Higher values prolong the time.

editor.label: ResourceNoReplenishRadiusStructures
editor.description: Allow resources to regrow closer or farther away from structures. Values higher than 1 increase the distance around structures where resources are not allowed to grow back. Values between 0 and 1 will reduce it.

editor.label: Resource No Replenish Radius Players
editor.description: Allow resources to regrow closer or farther away from players. Values higher than 1 increase the distance around players where resources are not allowed to grow back. Values between 0 and 1 will reduce it.

editor.label: Crop Decay Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number decrease (by percentage) speed of crop decay in plots.

editor.label: Auto PvE Use System Time
editor.description: Use system time instead of in-game time-.

editor.label: Auto PvE Start Time Seconds
editor.description: Seconds after midnight after which PvE is automatically started.

editor.label: Auto PvE Stop Time Seconds
editor.description: Seconds after midnight after which PvE is automatically stopped.

editor.label: Disable Friendly Fire
editor.description: Prevent-Friendly-Fire (among tribesmates/tribesdinos/tribesstructures) option for PvP servers.

editor.label: PvE Disable Friendly Fire
editor.description: Prevent-Friendly-Fire (among tribesmates/tribesdinos/tribesstructures) option for PvE servers.

editor.label: Increase PvP Respawn Interval Check Period
Increase PvP Respawn Interval Base Amount
PvE Allow Tribe War
editor.description: False disables capability for Tribes to officially declare war on each other for mutually-agreed-upon period of time.

editor.label: PvE Allow Tribe War Cancel
editor.description: True allows cancellation of an agreed-upon war before it has actually started.

editor.label: PvP Zone Structure Damage Multiplier
editor.description:
Specifies the scaling factor for damage structures take within caves.
The lower the value, the less damage the structure takes (i.e. setting to 1.0 will make structure built in or near a cave receive the same amount of damage as those built on the surface).

editor.label: Prevent Offline PvP Connection Invincible Interval
Passive Defenses Damage Riderless Dinos
editor.description: True allow spike walls to damage wild/riderless Dinos.

editor.label: Dino Harvesting Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) the damage done to a harvestable item/entity by a Dino. The higher number, the faster you collect.

editor.label: DinoTurretDamageMultiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) the damage done by Turrets towards a Dino

editor.label: Disable Dino Riding
editor.description: Disable riding of dinos.

editor.label: Disable Dino Taming
editor.description: Disable taming of dinos.

editor.label: Tamed Dino Character Food Drain Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how fast tame dinos consume food.

editor.label: Tamed Dino Torpor Drain Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how fast tamed dinos lose torpor.

editor.label: Wild Dino Character Food Drain Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how fast wild dinos consume food.

editor.label: Wild Dino Torpor Drain Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how fast wild dinos lose torpor.

editor.label: Passive Tame Interval Multiplier
editor.description: A multiplier on how often you get tame requests for passive tame dinos.

editor.label: Destroy Tames Over Level Clamp﻿
editor.description: Tames that exceed that level will be deleted on server start. Official servers have it set to 449.

editor.label: Flyer Platform Allow Unaligned Dino Basing
editor.description: Quetz platforms will not allow any non-allied dino to base on them when they are flying. If you want your server to allow non-allied dinos to be able to stand on the Quetz platforms set this to true.

editor.label: Allow Flyer Speed Leveling
editor.description: Specifies whether flyer creatures can have their Movement Speed leveled up.

editor.label: Poop Interval Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number decreases (by percentage) how frequently you can poop.

editor.label: Hair Growth Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increase speed of hair growth.

editor.label: Player Harvesting Damage Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) the damage done to a harvestable item/entity by a Player. The higher number, the faster you collect.

editor.label: Tribe Slot Reuse Cooldown
editor.description: Set this to a number > 0 to act as a timer. Locks a tribe slot for the value in seconds, so a value of 3600 would mean that if someone leaves the tribe, their place cannot be taken by another player (or rejoin) for 1 hour. Used on Official Small Tribes Servers.

editor.label: Max Tribe Logs
editor.description: How many Tribe logs are displayed for each tribe.

editor.label: Max Number Of Players In Tribe
editor.description: Set this to a number > 0 to act as a limit. 1 Player Tribes effectively disables Tribes.

editor.label: Max Alliances Per Tribe
editor.description: Define the maximum alliances a tribe can form or be part of.

editor.label: Max Tribes Per Alliance
editor.description: Define the maximum of tribes in an alliance.

editor.label: Disable Structure Placement Collision
editor.description: If 'true' allows for structures to clip into the terrain.

editor.label: Use Tame Limit For Structures Only
editor.description: If true, will make Tame Units only be applied and used for Platforms with Structures and Rafts effectively disabling Tame Units for Dinos without Platform Structures.

editor.label: Ignore Structures Prevention Volumes
editor.description: Enable building in Mission Volumes on Genesis Part 1.

editor.label: Disable Default Map Item Sets
editor.description: Disable Genesis 2 Tek Suit on Spawn.

editor.label: Disable Genesis Missions
editor.description: Enable or disable missions on Genesis.

editor.label: Disable World Buffs
editor.description: Disables world effects from Missions (Genesis: Part 2) altogether.

editor.label: Enable World Buff Scaling
editor.description: Makes world effects from Missions (Genesis: Part 2) scale from server settings, rather than add/subtract a flat amount to the value at runtime.

editor.label: World Buff Scaling Efficacy
editor.description: Makes world effects from Missions (Genesis: Part 2) scaling more or less effective when setting bEnableWorldBuffScaling=true. 1 would be default, 0.5 would be 50% less effective, 100 would be 100x more effective.

editor.label: Genesis Use Structures Prevention Volumes
editor.description: Disable building in mission areas on Genesis Part 1 if set to true.

editor.label: Auto Unlock All Engrams
editor.description: Unlocks all Engrams available. Ignores OverrideEngramEntries and OverrideNamedEngramEntries entries.

editor.label: Allow Custom Recipes
editor.description: Allow custom recipes.

editor.label: Custom Recipe Effectiveness Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) the effectiveness of a custom recipe.

editor.label: Custom Recipe Skill Multiplier
editor.description: Higher number increases (by percentage) the effect of the players crafting speed level that is used as a base for the formula in creating a custom recipe.

editor.label: Show Creative Mode
editor.description: Enables creative mode.

editor.label: Fast Decay Interval
editor.description: Enable this option for a fixed constant decay period for "Fast Decay" structures (such as pillars or lone foundations). Value is in seconds.

editor.label: Use Corpse Locator
editor.description: If set to true, you will see a green light beam at the location of your death.

editor.label: Use Corpse Life Span Multiplier
editor.description: Modifies corpse AND dropped box lifespan.

editor.label: Global Corpse Decomposition Time Multiplier
editor.description: Scales the decomposition time of corpses, (player and dinosaur), globally. Higher values prolong the time.

editor.label: Hard Limit Turrets In Range
editor.description:
Enable the retroactive turret hard limit.
This will work on autoturrets, heavy turrets, tek turrets, plant turrets and is no longer map specific. The hard limit calculation is done on start-up, so if your turrets are ever over the limit, they will be randomly shut-off until you're under the limit. In order to restore shut off turrets, you must pick up any which exceed the number, as well as shut-off turrets and replace them in order for them to work.

editor.label: Fuel Consumption Interval Multiplier
editor.description: Define the interval of fuel consumption.

editor.label: Global Powered Battery Durability Decrease Per Second
Limit Non Player Dropped Items Range
editor.description: Limit the number of droppeditems in an area (together with LimitNonPlayerDroppedItemsCount). Official servers have it set to 1600.

editor.label: Limit Non Player Dropped Items Count
editor.description: Limit the number of droppeditems in an area(together with LimitNonPlayerDroppedItemsRange). Official servers have it set to 600.

editor.label: Max Fall Speed Multiplier
editor.description: Defines the falling speed multiplier at which players starts taking fall damage. The falling speed is based on the time players spent in the air while having a negated Z axis velocity meaning that the higher this setting is, the longer players can fall without taking fall damage. For example, having it set to 0.1 means players will no longer survive a regular jump while having it set very high such as to 100.0 means players will survive a fall from the sky limit, etc. This setting doesn't affect the gravity scale of the players so there won't be any physics difference to the character movements.

editor.label: Fishing Loot Quality Multiplier
editor.description: Increases the quality of items that have a quality when fishing.

editor.label: Disable Loot Crates
editor.description: True prevent spawning of Loot crates (artifact creates will still spawn).

editor.label: Supply Crate Loot Quality Multiplier
editor.description: Increases the quality of items that have a quality in the supply crates. The quality also depends on the Difficulty Offset.

editor.label: Harvest Resource Item Amount Class Multipliers
Map
editor.description: Specify the map by name (eg. TheCenter). Use the "Map Mod ID" field if you want to specify the map by Mod ID instead.
editor.requiredMessage: You need to set a value for Map

configFiles.description: Specify admins that are not forced to enter the admin password to become admin.

editor.label: Map
editor.description: Specify the map by name (eg. TheCenter). Use the "Map Mod ID" field if you want to specify the map by Mod ID instead.
editor.requiredMessage: You need to set a value for Map
